/usr/bin/c++ -O0 -g3 -fno-inline -fno-inline-functions -fno-inline-small-functions -fkeep-inline-functions -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -fsanitize=address,undefined CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/layout_and_type_constraits_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/matrix_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/flush_behaviour_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/mode_switch_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/spmv_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/large_matrix_stress_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/merge_tests.cpp.o -o unit_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread lib/libgtest.a
